items.title: Jordan Clarkson has fond memories of the #Spurs’ championship celebrations during the Tim Duncan era.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Jordan Clarkson has fond memories of the #Spurs’ championship celebrations during the Tim Duncan era.

Now, he hopes to rain on their parade.

On Wagner High grad playing on the big stage in his hometown:

www.expressnews.com/sports/spurs...

media.title: San Antonio native, Knicks guard Jordan Clarkson hopes to rain on Spurs parade
media.description: The graduate of Wagner has played well against the Spurs throughout his 12 NBA seasons.

items.title: Dylan Harper: “It’s a blessing to represent the Philippines, where I’m from. I think me and Jordan Clarkson are doing a great job doing that.”
items.author: MrBuckBuck
